requirements.summary: Replace generic car icon thumbnails with actual image thumbnails in Media Manager
acceptanceCriteria: Media Manager grid displays actual image thumbnails instead of generic car icons
Image thumbnails are loaded from blob storage using their asset IDs
Thumbnails maintain proper aspect ratio and fit within grid cells
Loading state shows skeleton while thumbnails are being fetched

file_operations.description: Replace the current car icon placeholder rendering with actual image thumbnails. For image assets (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP), render an element using the blob URL constructed from the asset's blobId. Maintain the existing grid layout and aspect ratio handling. Keep the PDF file icon rendering unchanged. Add loading skeleton states while images are being fetched. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement proper image URL generation utility for media assets
acceptanceCriteria: Utility function correctly constructs blob URLs from asset IDs
Function handles both image and PDF asset types appropriately
URLs are properly formatted for the Internet Computer canister HTTP interface
Error handling for failed image loads shows fallback UI

file_operations.description: Create a utility function that generates blob URLs from asset blob IDs using the Internet Computer canister HTTP endpoint pattern. The function should construct URLs in the format: `${window.location.origin}/?assetId=${blobId}` to access blob storage assets. Include a secondary helper function to determine if a MIME type represents an image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) versus other file types like PDF.

Import and integrate the new blob URL utility function. Use it to generate image URLs for rendering thumbnails. Add error handling with onError callback to display fallback UI (the existing car icon or a broken image placeholder) when image loading fails. Ensure the utility is called for each image asset in the grid.
